     /home/ubuntu/code/stwork/deepwork-pro/frontend/
     src/v2/portals/cli/CliV2.vue:56:// as its own
     row (#tabs slot), which is the only tab nav on
     phones. One TopTabBar either way.
     /home/ubuntu/code/stwork/deepwork-pro/frontend/
     src/v2/portals/cli/CliV2.vue:71:// longer
     occupy a topbar row — they live in the per-tab
     hover / long-press tip (TopTabBar),

● B 已后台开跑。条结构摸清了。现在做 A 的
  brainstorm。先补 brainstorm 方法卡 + tab/连接 chip
  落点细节打底：
